purpose: AI-powered job application assistant that reads job descriptions, tailors resumes to match employer language while maintaining authenticity, auto-fills job applications via Playwright, and tracks the entire application lifecycle with specialized AI agents
features: Profile builder (upload resume PDF/Word, paste LinkedIn, manual entry) stored in RAG/CAG
Job listing analyzer (paste URLs, Playwright scrapes JD)
Scout Agent - finds and analyzes job matches
Tailor Agent - rewrites resume in employer language while staying authentic
Coach Agent - interviews user to uncover hidden experience and fill gaps
Strategist Agent - positions personal brand for each role
Brand Advisor Agent - researches company culture and values
Coordinator Agent - fills application forms via Playwright with review/auto-submit choice
Application pipeline tracker (status, notes, follow-up reminders)
Gap analysis between JD and resume with AI interview
Skills inventory that grows over time from gap interviews

users.description: Individual job seekers and their friends

roles.name: Super Admin
roles.description: Full system access, can create custom roles and manage all users

roles.name: Admin
roles.description: Manage settings and users, cannot manage roles

roles.name: Pro User
roles.description: All features including auto-submit and multiple active job searches

ai_features.description: 6 specialized AI agents for different aspects of the job search journey

agents.name: Scout
agents.description: Analyzes job listings, identifies best matches

agents.name: Coach
agents.description: Interviews user to uncover hidden experience

agents.name: Strategist
agents.description: Positions personal brand for each role

nemo_guardrails.topic_domain: job search, resume optimization, career development, and job application management
